channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ICC Confirms Arrest Warrant vs Senator Bato dela Rosa as Major Political Shifts Unfold
item.description: Sa pinakabagong balita, kinumpirma ng International Criminal Court (ICC) na may inilabas itong arrest warrant laban kay Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa. Lumabas si dela Rosa mula sa pagtatago at nagpa...

item.title: Nine-year-old diagnosed with rare aggressive leukaemia following nasal congestion
item.description: Isabella Potter, a nine-year-old British girl living in Hong Kong, experienced a sudden and severe health crisis after initially complaining of a blocked nose. What seemed a minor issue quickly escala...

item.title: Meta removes Instagram end-to-end encryption, raising privacy and child safety concerns
item.description: As of 8 May 2026, Instagram has disabled end-to-end encryption (E2EE) for direct messages, meaning Meta can now access all private messages sent on the platform. Meta justified the decision by citing ...

item.title: International Criminal Court Issues Arrest Warrant Against Dela Rosa Over War on Drugs
item.description: The International Criminal Court (ICC) has officially unsealed an arrest warrant against former Philippine police chief Ronald dela Rosa. This action is related to allegations concerning his role in t...

item.title: Omar Abdullah clarifies J&K liquor policy amid debate on religion and alcohol
item.description: Srinagar: Chief Minister Omar Abdullah stirred a debate on Monday with his remarks connecting alcohol consumption to religion while explaining Jammu & Kashmir’s liquor policy. He clarified that liquor...

item.title: Former Environment Minister Guilbeault Questions Government's Major Projects Proposal
item.description: Liberal MP Steven Guilbeault, previously federal environment minister, has publicly criticised his government's proposed reforms to accelerate the review process for major projects in Canada. He warne...

item.title: The Musical Legacy and Tragedy of Marvin Gaye and Tammi Terrell
item.description: Marvin Gaye and Tammi Terrell formed one of Motown's most celebrated musical duos during the late 1960s. Their collaboration, initiated in 1967 to rejuvenate Gaye's career, produced timeless hits like...

item.title: US Ambassador Nominee Pledges Accountability on Tanzania’s Electoral Issues
item.description: Donald Trump’s nominee for US ambassador to Tanzania, William Trachman, has made it very clear to US lawmakers that he plans to hold Tanzania accountable for its recent democratic backsliding. Trachma...

item.title: Body believed to be that of accused triple murderer Julian Ingram discovered in NSW nature reserve
item.description: NSW Police have located a body believed to be that of Julian Ingram, the 37-year-old man accused of a triple murder in the western New South Wales town of Lake Cargelligo on 22 January. The body was f...

item.title: Government Allocates 48.8 Billion Shillings to Strengthen Universal Health Insurance
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has officially allocated TZS 48.8 billion into the Universal Health Insurance Fund, a move aimed at improving access to healthcare services for citizens across the country. ...

item.title: The Systemic Impact of Gender Exclusion on Afghanistan’s Humanitarian Systems
item.description: The situation for women in Afghanistan under Taliban rule has escalated from a gender rights issue to a full humanitarian crisis. Systematic exclusion of women from public life, work, education, and h...

item.title: Kipchoge Calls for France-Africa Partnership to Nurture Sports Talent
item.description: Kenya's marathon legend Eliud Kipchoge has urged Africa to partner with France in order to fully unlock the continent's sports potential. Speaking at the Africa Forward Summit at the University of Nai...

item.title: Two Los Angeles Home Burglaries Thwarted by Alarms and Witness Intervention
item.description: Los Angeles police are investigating two residential burglaries in the city where the criminals were stopped either by home security systems or by residents themselves. On Sunday night at around 10:45...

item.title: Ramaphosa to Seek Judicial Review of Phala Phala Report, Refuses to Step Down
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has announced that he will not resign from office despite calls from some quarters, following the Constitutional Court's ruling that Parliament must revive the impeachment in...

item.title: Wordle to become a television gameshow despite its solitary nature
item.description: Television host Jimmy Fallon is set to adapt the popular word puzzle game Wordle into a TV gameshow, produced by his company Electric Hot Dog. The show will be filmed in Manchester, England, during th...

item.title: Small business falls victim to banking scam
item.description: The original news article could not be accessed due to website restrictions, so a full summary is unavailable. Based on the headline, the story appears to cover an incident where a small business was ...

item.title: Trump to Discuss Jimmy Lai’s Imprisonment with Xi Jinping at Summit
item.description: US President Donald Trump has confirmed that he will bring up the case of Jimmy Lai, the 78-year-old Hong Kong businessman, during his meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping this week. Lai, the fou...

item.title: NEET 2026 Exam Under Investigation Over Circulation of Guess Paper
item.description: The NEET UG 2026 examination, which is India's largest undergraduate medical entrance test, is currently under scrutiny following reports of a circulating 'guess paper' containing exam questions. Cond...

item.title: ICC affirms arrest warrant vs Senator Dela Rosa over drug war probe
item.description: Kinumpirma ng International Criminal Court (ICC) ang pag-isyu ng arrest warrant laban kay Senator Ronald “Bato” Dela Rosa, kaugnay ng imbestigasyon sa kontrobersyal na kampanya kontra droga sa Pilipin...

item.title: Trump Meets National Security Team to Discuss Potential Military Action Against Iran
item.description: President Donald Trump held a closed-door meeting on Monday with his top national security officials to discuss possible next steps in the ongoing U.S.-Iran conflict. The two countries have maintained...
